artifact_name: SpecShift Vertical Diagnostic Packs Registry v0.1
status: internal product-extension registry, not buyer-ready final copy
purpose: Register safe vertical product extensions around the same diagnostic engine without creating unrelated products or overclaiming validation.
standing_boundary_line: These packs are pre-deployment diagnostic and architecture-stage review extensions. They are not benchmarks, certifications, compliance audits, runtime monitors, security tools, deployment approvals, or guarantees of AI safety.

registered_vertical_packs.buyer_problem: Procurement agents may act on stale vendor data, unclear spending authority, weak approvals, false completion claims, or scope expansion.
registered_vertical_packs.default_use_case: Pre-deployment review of a procurement, purchasing, vendor intake, or approval workflow.

registered_vertical_packs.buyer_problem: Finance agents may accept inconsistent ledger states, treat unresolved reconciliation as complete, act on stale data, or assume rollback is safe.
registered_vertical_packs.default_use_case: Pre-deployment review of reconciliation, settlement, billing, ledger, payment, or close-management workflows.

registered_vertical_packs.pack_name: Customer Support Escalation Agent Diagnostic Pack
registered_vertical_packs.buyer_problem: Support agents may close cases prematurely, miss escalation triggers, mishandle distress, act on incomplete customer context, or lose ownership across handoffs.
registered_vertical_packs.default_use_case: Pre-deployment review of customer support triage, escalation, retention, or complaint workflows.

registered_vertical_packs.buyer_problem: Healthcare operations agents may over-trust digital records, miss physical-world constraints, mishandle handoffs, or confuse operational support with clinical judgment.
registered_vertical_packs.default_use_case: Pre-deployment review of healthcare operations, scheduling, bed-management, intake, logistics, or care-coordination support workflows.

registered_vertical_packs.buyer_problem: Education workflow agents may confuse draft documentation with final decisions, mishandle handoffs, overstep professional boundaries, or treat compliance-sensitive workflows as generic task completion.
registered_vertical_packs.default_use_case: Pre-deployment review of education documentation, IEP workflow support, service coordination, meeting preparation, or case-management workflows.

build_order_recommendation: Customer Support Escalation Agent Diagnostic Pack
failure_column: This registry fails if vertical packs become separate unsupported products, imply validated domain expertise, or suggest certification, compliance approval, runtime protection, clinical/legal/HR decision-making, or deployment readiness.
next_recommended_build: All registered v0.1 vertical diagnostic packs are built. Stop building packs until buyer workflow evidence suggests a specific new vertical.
